Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to group a list of 18 interleaved hospital process events into distinct cases patient journeys There are no explicit Case IDs so I need to deduce them based on attributes like patient demographics age gender department flow and logical activity sequences

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data Structure Each event has timestamp activity resource department patient age patient gender additional info Key identifiers for grouping patient age and patient gender demographics usually stay constant for a single case department and activity provide the flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Scan for Unique Patient Signatures Demographics Ill look at the patient age and patient gender columns across the list to identify distinct individuals Event 1 Age 45 Male M Event 2 Age 62 Female F Event 3 Age 28 Male M Event 4 Age 45 Male M Matches Event 1 Event 5 Age 62 Female F Matches Event 2 Event 6 Age 28 Male M Matches Event 3 Event 7 Age 45 Male M Matches Event 1 Event 8 Age 62 Female F Matches Event 2 Event 9 Age 28 Male M Matches Event 3 Event 10 Age 62 Female F Matches Event 2 Event 11 Age 62 Female F Matches Event 2 Event 12 Age 45 Male M Matches Event 1 Event 13 Age 28 Male M Matches Event 3 Event 14 Age 62 Female F Matches Event 2 Event 15 Age 45 Male M Matches Event 1 Event 16 Age 28 Male M Matches Event 3 Event 17 Age 62 Female F Matches Event 2 Event 18 Age 28 Male M Matches Event 3 Conclusion There are exactly three distinct patient profiles Cases Case A 45 year old Male Case B 62 year old Female Case C 28 year old Male

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group and Sequence Events for Each Case Case A 45M 1 080513 Register patient ER 4 081050 Initial triage ER Triage code 3 7 081542 X ray imaging Radiology Left leg 12 082310 Doctor consultation ER Diagnosis hairline fracture 15 083005 Patient discharged ER Followup outpatient clinic Case B 62F 2 080702 Register patient ER 5 081229 Initial triage ER Triage code 2 8 081610 Lab test requested ER Blood panel 10 082027 Lab test completed Laboratory Normal levels 11 082254 Doctor consultation ER Diagnosis minor infection 14 082700 Prescription created ER Antibiotics 17 083529 Patient discharged ER Followup pharmacy pickup Case C 28M 3 080715 Register patient Surgery Reason scheduled knee surgery 6 081300 Doctor consultation Surgery Dr Lee 9 081645 Surgery preparation Surgery General anesthesia 13 082519 Surgery performed Surgery Arthroscopy 16 083137 Recovery room Surgery Stable 18 084013 Patient discharged Surgery Followup physiotherapy

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Validation Check Timeline Consistency Do the timestamps make sense within each case Case A 0805 to 0830 makes sense for ER visit Case B 0807 to 0835 makes sense for ER visit with labs Case C 0807 to 0840 makes sense for a scheduled surgery though fast likely a minor procedure like arthroscopy Department Logic Case A and B are primarily ER flows Case C is primarily Surgery Cross Verification Did I miss any events Total 18 events Case A count 5 events Case B count 7 events Case C count 6 events Total 5 plus 7 plus 6 equals 18 All accounted for

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Formatting the Output Present the solution clearly Define the Case IDs for example Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 based on the demographics List the events in chronological order for each case to show the reconstructed journey

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Refining the Output Self Correction during drafting Make sure to explicitly state why they are grouped demographics Detail Mention the specific diagnosis or procedure for each to show the logic holds up for example hairline fracture matches the left leg X ray
